results.question: What coolant should I use for Innova Crysta?
results.ground_truth: Toyota Super Long Life Coolant or ethylene glycol based coolant
results.rag_answer:
You should use either "Toyota Super Long Life Coolant" or a similar high-quality ethylene glycol-based non-silicate, non-amine, non-nitrite, and non-borate coolant with long-life hybrid organic acid technology.

Source: (innova-crysta2024_mannual.pdf, Page 520) (innova-crysta2024_mannual.pdf, Page 384)

results.question: How do I check engine oil level in Fortuner?
results.ground_truth: Check with dipstick when engine is cold
results.rag_answer:
To check the engine oil level in a Fortuner, follow these steps: 

Park the vehicle on level ground. After warming up the engine and turning it off, wait more than 5 minutes for the oil to drain back into the bottom of the engine.
Remove the sand and dust from around the dipstick.
Holding a rag under the end, pull the dipstick out.
Wipe the dipstick clean.

(source: fortuner_2025_mannual.pdf, Page 318)

results.question: What is the tire pressure for Fortuner?
results.ground_truth: Refer to the tire placard on the vehicle door
results.rag_answer:
The recommended cold tire inflation pressure for the Fortuner is 200 kPa (2.0 kgf/cm2 or bar, 29 psi). 

(Source: fortuner_2025_mannual.pdf, Page 433 and Page 339)

results.question: How do I connect to WiFi on ThinkPad X250?
results.ground_truth: Use the wireless switch or Fn key combination
results.rag_answer:
To connect to WiFi on ThinkPad X250, you need to download and install the USB 3.0 driver. To do this, follow these steps:

1. Go to http://www.lenovo.com/ThinkPadDrivers.
2. Select your product name to view all the device drivers for your computer.
3. Select the device drivers you need, and follow the instructions on the screen.

You can also find the device drivers in the C:\SWTOOLS\DRIVERS directory on your internal storage.

Alternatively, if you see a list of available WLANs, you can select the network status icon in the taskbar, and then connect to one of the available networks.

Sources: 
(lennova_mannual.pdf, Page 88)
(hp_mannual.pdf, Page 26)
(hp_mannual.pdf, Page 26)

results.question: What ports does Dell Inspiron 15 3000 have?
results.ground_truth: USB ports, HDMI, headphone jack, SD card reader
results.rag_answer:
The Dell Inspiron 15 3000 has the following ports:

- 1 Power-adapter port
- 2 Network ports (1 RJ-45 port and 1 10/100 Mbps Ethernet controller integrated on system board)
- 1 HDMI port
- 2 SD-card slots (on the left and right side)
- 2 USB 2.0 ports
- 2 USB 3.0 ports (1 on the left and 1 on the right side)
- 1 Headset (headphone and microphone combo) port
- 1 M2 card slot for Wi-Fi/Bluetooth
- 1 SD-card slot to read from and write to the SD card

(source: dell_mannual_Inspiron_153000.pdf, Page 0, Page 8, Page 13, Page 22)

results.question: How do I charge the HP laptop?
results.ground_truth: Connect AC adapter to power connector
results.rag_answer:
To charge your HP laptop, connect the AC adapter to your laptop and to external power. You can use the HP provided AC adapter, a replacement AC adapter provided by HP, or a compatible AC adapter purchased from HP. (hp_mannual.pdf, Page 41; hp_mannual.pdf, Page 44)

Additionally, to reduce potential safety issues, make sure to follow the guidelines and usage instructions for your specific HP laptop model. 

If you have any further questions, please let me know.

Sources:
(hp_mannual.pdf, Page 41)
(hp_mannual.pdf, Page 44)

results.question: How do I replace the air filter on Fortuner?
results.ground_truth: Refer to maintenance schedule in manual
results.rag_answer:
To replace the air filter on Fortuner, follow these steps:

1. Pull out the damper as shown in the illustration, and then remove the glove box.
2. Remove the filter cover.
3. Remove the air conditioning filter and replace it with a new one.
Ensure the "UP" marks on the filter are pointing up.

Sources:
(filename, page number)
fortuner_2025_mannual.pdf, page 344

results.question: What is the warranty on HP laptop?
results.rag_answer:
The warranty on HP laptop can be found in the user guides on your product and/or on the CD or DVD provided in the box. In some countries or regions, HP may provide a printed warranty in the box. For countries or regions where the warranty is not provided in printed format, you can request a copy from http://www.hp.com/go/orderdocuments. The specific warranty information about the HP laptop can be accessed through HP Help and Support or by going to http://www.hp.com/go/orderdocuments.

(source: hp_manual.pdf, Page 11)

results.question: How do I adjust screen brightness on Lenovo?
results.rag_answer:
To adjust screen brightness on Lenovo, press the brightness control keys or go to Lenovo Settings from the Start menu, then click Camera. However, since there is no option for screen brightness adjustment under the camera settings, you can go to Lenovo Settings from the Start menu, and from there, you should be able to find and adjust the display and screen settings to your desired brightness level.

Alternatively, for Windows 10, you can open the Lenovo Settings app, click the settings icon in the upper-right corner, and follow the instructions on the screen to configure the display settings as desired.

(Sourcelennova_mannual.pdf, Page 68 & lennova_mannual.pdf, Page 54)
